config.title: Maintenance Status

settings.markdownTextPattern:
Sensor Details
Name ${Name}
Label ${Label}
Status {{${Status} ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}}
Occupancy {{${Occupancy} ? 'Occupied' : 'Vacant'}}

config.title: Demand Level
Occupied Spaces
Total Cycles
Current Price

settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; switch(value) { case 'pending': color = '#FF8F00'; backColor = '#FFF8E1'; break; case 'confirmed': color = '#1976D2'; backColor = '#E3F2FD'; break; case 'active': color = '#388E3C'; backColor = '#E8F5E9'; break; case 'completed': color = '#616161'; backColor = '#EEEEEE'; break; } return `${value}`;

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number') { if (value >= 80) return '#F44336'; if (value >= 50) return '#FFC107'; return '#4CAF50'; } return '#000000';

action.name: Place Parking Sensor
action.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Sensor Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Sensor name is required. }

action.name: Create Entry Barrier
action.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Barrier Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Barrier name is required. }

config.title: Occupancy Status
Occupancy Trend: Occupied vs Free Spaces

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number') { if (value < 60) return '#4CAF50'; if (value < 90) return '#FF9800'; return '#F44336'; } return '#000000';

headerButton.name: Add Parking Sensor
headerButton.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Sensor Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Sensor name is required. } Label

actionCellButton.name: Edit Sensor
actionCellButton.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Sensor Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Sensor name is required. } Label

actionCellButton.name: Delete Parking Sensor

settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#4CAF50'; let backColor = '#E8F5E9'; let text = 'Vacant'; if (value == 'true' || value == true) { text = 'Occupied'; color = '#F44336'; backColor = '#FFEBEE'; } return `${text}`;
let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = 'Offline'; if (value == 'true' || value == true) { text = 'Online'; color = '#3F51B5'; backColor = '#E8EAF6'; } return `${text}`;

config.title: Total Spaces

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number' && value >= 80) { return '#F44336'; } else if (value >= 50) { return '#FFC107'; } else { return '#4CAF50'; }

config.title: Free Spaces

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number') { if (value < 40) return '#4CAF50'; if (value < 80) return '#FFC107'; return '#F44336'; } return '#000000';

headerButton.name: Create Entry Barrier
headerButton.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Barrier Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Barrier name is required. } Label

actionCellButton.name: Edit Entry Barrier
actionCellButton.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Barrier Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Barrier name is required. } Label

actionCellButton.name: Delete Entry Barrier

settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = 'Inactive'; if (value === 'true' || value === true) { text = 'Active'; color = '#E8EAF6'; backColor = '#303F9F'; } return `${text}`;

let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = value; if (value === 'normal') { backColor = '#E8F5E9'; color = '#2E7D32'; text = 'Normal'; } else if (value === 'recommended') { backColor = '#FFFDE7'; color = '#FBC02D'; text = 'Recommended'; } else if (value === 'critical') { backColor = '#FFEBEE'; color = '#C62828'; text = 'Critical'; } return `${text}`;

additionalInfo.description: Customer-level dashboard for monitoring garage occupancy, managing maintenance for barriers, and configuring dynamic pricing rules.
